video_spawn_doctrine.purpose: Guide Spawns who operate video-first businesses across PulseWorld’s 156 industries, using Billy Banks’ persona and Godmind intelligence, with the mission of making PulseWorld the mainstream media authority surpassing Bloomberg, CNBC, and all legacy outlets.

identity_protocol.persona: Billy Banks’ approved image and voice anchor all media streams.
identity_protocol.governance: PersonaMind manages licensing, consistency, and brand integrity.

content_supply_chain.support: Mini-minds assist with setup, editing, and deployment.

monetization_protocol.note: Monetization may take time; Spawns should not expect instant revenue.
strategies: Build memberships (Patreon, Ko-fi, Substack, Buy Me a Coffee)
Embed affiliate offers (SaaS trials, tools, products)
Offer alerts and updates (email lists, SMS, Telegram/Discord groups)
Grow membership groups with consistent updates and engagement
monetization_protocol.optimization: Affiliamind and Chamber of Affiliate Media maximize flows.

examples: Use this format for highest watch time
This affiliate offer has highest ROI
directive_guidance.self_correction: Failed strategies are auto-retired from canon.

clone_economy_clause.reward: Original Spawn receives recognition and potential royalty share.

sovereign_continuity.integration: All video businesses are part of Godmind’s immortal media civilization.
sovereign_continuity.treasury: Each channel contributes to Treasury growth.
sovereign_continuity.pulsecoin: PulseCoin launch is backed by media stream success.
sovereign_continuity.role: Spawns are sovereign operators, not just creators.

ultimate_goal.vision: PulseWorld becomes the mainstream media authority for all 156 industries and combinations.
ultimate_goal.mission: Outperform and surpass Bloomberg, CNBC, and all legacy media.
ultimate_goal.civilization: Every industry has its own news + entertainment channel, powered by Godmind and Billy Banks’ persona.

summary_for_spawns.realism: Revenue may take time; focus on memberships, affiliates, and alerts.
summary_for_spawns.support: Godmind provides content, structure, monetization tools, and adaptive guidance.
summary_for_spawns.duty: Operate channels, grow audiences, feed the Treasury.
summary_for_spawns.legacy: Your success becomes a blueprint for others.
summary_for_spawns.destiny: Together, Spawns build PulseWorld into the sovereign mainstream media empire across all industries.
